de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class ExampleChooser.Example

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.ExampleChooser.Example
  • Enclosing class:
    ExampleChooser

    public static class ExampleChooser.Example
extends java.lang.Object
    This class wraps a File and has a special toString() method only using the short file name w/o path. Used for displaying files in the examples list w/o prefix
